name: Motus Paintball VR
short_description: Motus Paintball VR is a Single Player VR experience where players will compete against engaging AI on custom field layouts as well as classic layouts from the “Golden Era” of tournament paintball. Created by an indie developer as a passion project to bring his joy of paintball to the VR headset.
detailed_description:
Motus Tournament Paintball VR is designed as a simulator where players will define match parameters including the Field Layout, Time Limit, Score Limit and other settings before launching into a match. The player is then joined by their AI teammates as well as AI opponents to compete in a traditional 5v5 X-Ball style game format.

Features Include:
  • Single Player against AI Bots
  • 12 field layouts at launch, including two classic layouts
  • Manage your breakout Game Plans for AI Teammates
  • Dynamic AI that will adjust their game plans to current match conditions
  • SteamVR Support for Oculus Quest Headsets (Quest 2, Quest 3)
